# Todo

_Updated 2026-05-09. Focus: Korean AI website agency competitive scrape for Service W — 32 competitors profiled across 7 segments, bilingual KO+EN Notion report shipped to Business 🚀. GeoRank confirmed as benchmark threat; "AI-native LP + Korean compliance lint + llms.txt at sub-₩2M / sub-1-week" identified as the empty box._

---

## 모두의 창업 2026

- [ ] **Submit application** — modoo.or.kr, Q1-Q4 paste + Q5-Q9 select, deadline 2026.05.15 16:00

---

## AI AGENCY — NEXT EXECUTION (Plan 00 → Plan 03 → Plans 01+02)

- [ ] **Plan 00 (intake + CRM)** — Tally form (5문항) + Notion Clients DB (12컬럼) + /agency-intake skill. Must complete BEFORE any client work.
- [ ] **Agency brand name decision** — "1stmover Studio" placeholder vs separate name. Blocks cold DM and dogfood site.
- [ ] **Cold DM channel decision** — IG DM vs KakaoTalk for 화장품 D2C outreach. (IG DM recommended)
- [ ] **Service 3 Plan 03 — Phase A build** (5 tasks):
  - [ ] [A1] Next.js 15 template repo (Korean SEO + llms.txt + JSON-LD + cosmetics-ad-lint + medical-ad-lint + lighthouse-ci)
  - [ ] [A2] /web-brief skill (intake → advertorial brief)
  - [ ] [A3] /web-bootstrap skill (artifact → Next.js → audit gate → GitHub push)
  - [ ] [A4] /web-deploy skill (Vercel CLI + Vercel Analytics + Naver SA + GSC)
  - [ ] [A5] Agency dogfood site (run Phase B on own site, 4-hour time-box — cold DM destination)
- [ ] **Service W tactical recommendations from 2026-05-09 competitor scrape** (32 competitors profiled):
  - [ ] **Public price page + 5-day countdown booking widget** — ₩1.5M / ₩2M / ₩200K-mo with bullets. Source: 메이크24, The Compass. Effort S, Impact H.
  - [ ] **Vertical-specific free wedge — pick ONE: 화장품 D2C OR 강남 한의원** — "30초 화장품 D2C GEO + 광고 표현 진단" routed to KakaoTalk (not email). Cosmetics first (higher AOV per LP). Source: GeoRank. Effort M, Impact H.
  - [ ] **Two flagship case studies with hard numbers** (CVR before/after, AI citation increase, Naver indexing). Discount first 2 clients to ₩500K each in exchange for case study rights. Source: The Compass, GeoRank. Effort M, Impact H.
  - [ ] **Productize 의료광고심의 + 화장품법 lint as public spec** — checklist on site signals "we get Korean regulation" + forces us to actually have it. Source: 메이크24, 골드닥터스. Effort M, Impact H.
  - [ ] **Speakable schema + llms-full.txt as deliverables** (not llms.txt only) — close GeoRank's vocabulary lead in one sprint. Effort S, Impact M.
  - [ ] **Submit first 2 case studies to GDWEB + i-Awards** — even finalist citation kills "non-tier-1" objection. Source: PlusX, Defi. Effort S, Impact M.
  - [ ] **Free GEO Scanner clone routed to KakaoTalk channel ID** (not email) — friction matches Korean buyer expectation. Source: GeoRank. Effort M, Impact M.
  - [ ] **Audit ₩200K/mo retainer scope vs FRICO ₩120K** — 1-pager listing exactly 3 things FRICO doesn't do (KakaoTalk dashboard + monthly A/B + quarterly seasonal LP). If we can't list 3, retainer dies. Source: FRICO. Effort S, Impact M.
  - [ ] **Cosmetics + 한의원 split into 2 separate landing pages** — buyer in 화장품 D2C should not land on a page that talks about 의료광고심의. Source: 매스티지, 메이크24. Effort M, Impact M.
  - [ ] **Test 100% 후불제 (pay-after-delivery) for first 3 cosmetics clients** — risk-reverses harder than refund guarantee, becomes "100% 후불제 첫 3팀 모집" scarcity hook. Source: 닷클. Effort S, Impact M.
  - [ ] **Set up monthly competitor watchlist** — `research/competitor-watchlist-monthly.md`, 12 competitors at 15 min each. Top: GeoRank, 메이크24, The Compass, FRICO, imweb AI features.
- [ ] **Service 2 Plan 02 — Phase A build** (7 tasks):
  - [ ] [A1] Trigger.dev cloud Pro ($50/mo) setup + GWS CLI + Claude Code MCP — BLOCKED: $50/mo subscription needed
  - [ ] [A2] KakaoTalk Channel API + 1-page 한국어 온보드 가이드— BLOCKED: need first prospect with 사업자
  - [x] **Speed-to-Lead Flask MVP end-to-end verified** — webhook + Haiku triage (95%) + Sonnet Korean reply + Notion log DB (1stmover-webhook integration shared, 7 rows persisted). Only Kakao creds blocking real client (2026-05-06).
  - [ ] [A3] /speed-to-lead 스킬 (per-client Trigger.dev workflow deployer) — BLOCKED: Trigger.dev subscription
  - [ ] [A4] /workflow-eval 스킬 (Braintrust integration) — BLOCKED: Braintrust $25/mo subscription
  - [x] [A5] 화장품 D2C 자격검증 체크리스트 — DONE (qualifier-cosmetics.md)
  - [x] [A6] 콜드 DM 템플릿 (3 KO templates) — DONE (cold-dm-templates-automation.md)
  - [x] [A7] PIPA risk assessment 1-pager — DONE (pipa-risk-assessment-template.md)
- [ ] **Service 1 Plan 01 — Phase A build** (7 tasks):
  - [ ] [A1] Higgsfield CLI 설치 + Braintrust + ElevenLabs v3 + Suno Pro — BLOCKED: Higgsfield $100 subscription needed
  - [x] [A2] Per-client Claude Project 템플릿 — DONE (5 files uploaded, URL in torriden-pilot/setup.md)
  - [x] [A3] Korean VoC scraper — DONE (services/video/voc_scraper.py)
  - [x] [A4] /foundational-docs 스킬 — DONE (.claude/skills/foundational-docs/, tested with Torriden)
  - [ ] [A5] /angle-discovery 스킬 — BLOCKED: Higgsfield subscription needed

inputs.lessons:
# Lessons — Self-Improvement Log

After any correction, mistake, or pattern worth remembering, append here.
Claude reads this at session start to avoid repeating the same errors.

Format: `[YYYY-MM-DD] MISTAKE/PATTERN: ... | FIX: ... | RULE: ...`

---

[2026-03-09] MISTAKE: Tried to Write a file without reading it first, causing tool error. | FIX: Always Read before Write or Edit. | RULE: Read → Edit/Write. Never Write cold.

[2026-03-09] MISTAKE: Put Korean characters (바탕 화면) directly in a JSON hook command string — caused encoding fragility. | FIX: Extract the logic to a .py helper script and call the script path instead. | RULE: Never embed multi-byte paths in inline JSON strings. Use a script file.

[2026-03-09] MISTAKE: Attributed ChromaDB failure to "MCP compatibility" in mock interview context. | FIX: Correct explanation is Python 3.14 + Pydantic v1 runtime type inference issue. | RULE: ChromaDB fails on Python 3.14 due to Pydantic v1, not MCP. State this precisely.

[2026-03-09] PATTERN: Wispr Flow voice-to-text causes phonetic typos in Korean/English tech terms (e.g. "link chain" → LangChain). | RULE: Interpret tech term typos charitably. Always confirm before correcting.

[2026-03-09] PATTERN: User prefers to keep moving — flag human-in-loop blockers and skip, don't stop. | RULE: Note blocked items in a queue, continue to next task automatically.

[2026-03-12] CORRECTION: "Cover letters" do not exist in Korean job applications. The correct format is 자기소개서 (자소서) — structured responses to company-specific prompts (지원동기, 성장과정, 직무 경험, 장단점 etc.). What was created in `projects/next-ai-role/cover-letter-*.md` are 자소서 narrative drafts, not ready-to-submit documents. Each company's actual 자소서 questions must be pulled from their application portal first, then the narrative content mapped to those prompts.

[2026-04-06] PATTERN: Build mode vs Ship mode. Built 5+ projects to production-ready state but contacted zero clients. The system is optimized for building, not selling. | FIX: Every session should include at least one go-to-market action (draft DM, post listing, run audit on real target). | RULE: "Built" is not "shipped." A project without a client conversation is a hobby project.

[2026-04-06] PATTERN: Dormant capabilities accumulate. 8 skills, 2 agents, 5 commands, 6 cron schedules — all built but never invoked. | FIX: Audit utilization quarterly. If a capability hasn't been used in 30 days, either use it or archive it. | RULE: Don't build more tools until existing ones are being used.

[2026-04-06] PATTERN: Lessons.md itself went stale (3 entries in 4 weeks). Self-improvement loops only work if they run. | FIX: Added /daily-learn to session-end SOP. | RULE: The meta-habit (logging lessons) matters more than any individual lesson.

[2026-04-22] MISTAKE: Used `dangerouslyDisableSandbox: true` on rm commands, which triggers stricter approval and gets auto-denied even when `Bash(rm:*)` is in the allowlist. | FIX: Drop `dangerouslyDisableSandbox
...[truncated]
inputs.priorities:
# Current Priorities

_Last updated: 2026-05-10 — Sing It dropped, AI agency is sole revenue priority. Service V and A first, W deprioritized._

---

## 1. AI Agency — Sole Revenue Priority

Three services. Order is V and A first, W deprioritized as of 2026-05-09 per Keonhee. 영범 is lead-sourcing partner.

| Service | Status | Pricing |
|---|---|---|
| **V** — AI 영상 광고 (Higgsfield Pro / Veo 3 / ElevenLabs v3 / Suno Pro / Claude Sonnet) | Stack signup pending (A1 blocker) | ₩1.5M flat first 5, then tier menu up to ₩3M / retainer ₩2.5-5M/mo |
| **A** — AI 자동화 (Speed-to-Lead Flask + Make.com → n8n on NCP) | Wedge demo built, sales not started | ₩500K setup + ₩200K/월 (PIPA Tier P ₩3M + ₩500K/월) |
| **W** — AI 웹사이트 (Claude Design + Next.js 15 + Vercel) | Phase A 5 tasks not started | ₩500K-1.5M/건 |

### Active blockers (ranked by leverage)

1. **Cold DM channel decision** (IG DM vs KakaoTalk) — unblocks all outreach. IG DM recommended.
2. **Agency brand name decision** — unblocks cold DM, dogfood site, all client-facing artifacts.
3. **Plan 00 build** — Tally form + Notion Clients DB + /agency-intake skill. Self-imposed gate; can be bypassed with Google Form + manual Notion entry for first clients.
4. **V stack API keys** — Higgsfield Pro, ElevenLabs v3, Veo 3, Suno Pro. Required for V Phase A1.
5. **모두의창업 2026 application** — submit Q1-Q9, deadline 2026.05.15 16:00 (D-5 from today).

### W Phase A (5 tasks, on hold while V/A move first)

- [A1] Next.js 15 template repo (Korean SEO + llms.txt + JSON-LD + cosmetics-ad-lint + medical-ad-lint + lighthouse-ci)
- [A2] /web-brief skill (intake → advertorial brief)
- [A3] /web-bootstrap skill (artifact → Next.js → audit gate → GitHub push)
- [A4] /web-deploy skill (Vercel CLI + Vercel Analytics + Naver SA + GSC)
- [A5] Agency dogfood site (run Phase B on own site, 4-hour time-box)

### Service W tactical items from 2026-05-09 competitor scrape (32 competitors, 8 actions)

Ranked by Effort/Impact:
- [Effort S, Impact H] Public price page + 5-day countdown booking widget
- [Effort S, Impact M] Speakable schema + llms-full.txt as deliverables
- [Effort M, Impact H] Vertical wedge: 화장품 D2C OR 강남 한의원 (cosmetics first)
- [Effort M, Impact H] Two flagship case studies with hard numbers (discount first 2 to ₩500K)
- [Effort M, Impact H] Productize 의료광고심의 + 화장품법 lint as public spec
- [Effort S, Impact M] Submit first 2 case studies to GDWEB + i-Awards
- [Effort M, Impact M] Free GEO Scanner clone routed to KakaoTalk
- [Effort S, Impact M] Audit ₩200K/mo retainer scope vs FRICO ₩120K (1-pager)

---

## 2. AI Study — Daily Non-Negotiable

**6 hours/day, Mon–Fri.** Compounding investment that funds everything else.

- Deepen understanding of agentic AI, MCPs, LangGraph, RAG, Claude Code
- Build fluency to teach SDIC members from genuine expertise
- Primary reading surface: NotebookLM notebooks (Hormozi, AI Workflow, Claude & AI Tools, Consulting Interview)

---

inputs.decisions:
# Decision Log

Append-only. When a meaningful decision is made, log it here.

Format: [YYYY-MM-DD] DECISION: ... | REASONING: ... | CONTEXT: ...

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Speed-to-Lead MVP uses Flask + ngrok, NOT Trigger.dev, for first client demos | REASONING: Trigger.dev $50/mo subscription not yet purchased; Flask server (speed_to_lead.py) is production-ready and passes 6/6 tests — no need to block demo path on subscription. Trigger.dev becomes relevant only after 3+ paying clients. | CONTEXT: Service 2 AI 자동화 end-to-end build session

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Speed-to-Lead Notion log DB is separate from Clients CRM DB | REASONING: Existing Notion DB (41672825...) is the Clients CRM (pipeline tracking). Speed-to-Lead needs a separate log DB for per-inquiry records (고객ID, 문의내용, 카테고리, Eval점수 etc). Created new DB: 1584294713e84016aed7a81930b83630. | CONTEXT: Discovered during session when fetching the Clients DB schema

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Production server = Naver Cloud Platform, NOT Oracle Cloud | REASONING: Oracle Cloud is barely used in Korean market; NCP is the Korean standard (한국어 지원, Korean data sovereignty, familiar to Korean clients), free for 1 year micro tier then ₩11,000/월. Oracle signup was started but dropped. | CONTEXT: User questioned why Oracle was recommended; Korean market context surfaced NCP as better fit

[2026-05-06] DECISION: Trigger.dev fully dropped; automation backbone = Make.com (first client) → n8n self-hosted (3+ clients) | REASONING: User confirmed they will use Make.com or n8n. Make.com is faster to set up for first demo; n8n on NCP VM is the production path. Trigger.dev $50/mo subscription never needed. | CONTEXT: Service 2 automation stack finalized during action plan session

[2026-05-06] DECISION: ngrok is the only server needed for MVP demo phase | REASONING: Flask server runs locally, ngrok provides public URL for KakaoTalk webhook — no cloud VM needed until first paying client is signed. Avoids Oracle/NCP setup overhead before
